wardrobe.Mia: casual home wear, legs tucked under on couch
wardrobe.Jenny: casual teen, dark brown hair in ponytail, on phone

key_props: scattered dinosaur toys (plush T-Rex, plastic Triceratops, pterodactyl)
camera: Wide establishing shot, STATIC, 8s. Full view of living room; TV left, couch center-left, kitchen background right.

wardrobe.Leo: green dinosaur-pattern pajamas, hugging plush T-Rex

key_props: scattered toy dinosaurs (plastic T-Rex, Triceratops, pterodactyl)
camera: Medium shot on Leo, STATIC with slight PUSH, 6s. Leo center, cross-legged on couch.

wardrobe.Nina: elegant black formal dress, putting on earrings
wardrobe.Jenny: casual teen, dark brown hair in ponytail (background, on phone)

camera: Medium tracking shot following Nina, TRACK left to right, 15s. Smooth track from living room toward front door.

wardrobe.Jenny: casual teen, dark brown hair in ponytail, on phone (background, oblivious)

camera: Two-shot Gabe/Nina, STATIC with occasional REFRAMES, 45s. Medium shot from waist up.

wardrobe.Jenny: casual teen, dark brown hair in ponytail, head tilted down at phone

camera: Close-up insert on Jenny, STATIC, 5s. Phone glow on face, shallow depth of field, background blurred.
Close-up insert on TV, STATIC, 4s. TV screen fills most of frame.

wardrobe.Mia: casual home wear (OTS, back of head visible)

camera: OTS from behind kids, STATIC, 30s. Camera behind/between kids looking past them at TV and parents in background.

wardrobe.Mia: casual home wear, looking up at off-screen parents

camera: Close-up on Mia, SLOW PUSH, 20s. Mia center frame, looking up at parents off-screen. Emotional anchor of the scene.
Close-up to Two-shot, STATIC then PULL to include Nina, 77s. Starts close on Gabe's face, slowly pulls back when Nina enters frame screen left with glare.
